name: zx
what_it_does: JavaScript/TypeScript tool for writing shell scripts. zx provides the $`command` template tag to execute shell commands from JavaScript with proper error handling, output capture, and async support. Eliminates shell scripting pain points ‚Äî handles quoting, error codes, parallel execution, and piping while staying in JavaScript/TypeScript. Built by Google.
use_cases: Replace bash scripts with JavaScript/TypeScript for complex automation that needs conditional logic, JSON parsing, and error handling
Build agent automation pipelines that orchestrate shell commands with TypeScript type safety and proper error handling
Run parallel shell commands in agent CI scripts: await Promise.all([$`build`, $`test`, $`lint`])
Process command output as structured data ‚Äî parse JSON, filter lines, transform output in JavaScript
Write cross-platform scripts that avoid bash-incompatibility issues between macOS/Linux/Windows
not_for: Simple one-liner scripts ‚Äî plain bash is simpler for trivial commands
Production server runtime ‚Äî zx is a scripting tool, not a production runtime
Performance-critical scripts where shell overhead is unacceptable ‚Äî native Node.js child_process for performance-sensitive use
best_when: You need complex automation logic (conditionals, loops, JSON processing) that's painful in bash but natural in JavaScript ‚Äî zx bridges shell and JS cleanly.
avoid_when: Simple shell scripts that are 5 lines or less ‚Äî bash is more appropriate. Also avoid when portability to environments without Node.js is required.

pricing.notes: Apache 2.0 licensed Google open source project.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Failed commands throw ProcessOutput with exit code, stdout, stderr, and command string. Error context is excellent for debugging automation failures.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Script idempotency depends on the commands executed. zx provides no built-in idempotency ‚Äî implement in script logic.
known_agent_gotchas: Shell injection is possible if user-provided data is interpolated in template tags ‚Äî use $.({input}) or quote() helper for untrusted input; $`rm ${userInput}` is dangerous
zx v8 changed to ESM-only ‚Äî .mjs files or package.json 'type: module' required; CommonJS scripts from zx v7 need updating
Default shell is bash on Unix ‚Äî Windows uses cmd.exe; cross-platform scripts must use $.({shell: 'powershell'}) or test on target platforms
Command output includes trailing newlines ‚Äî use .trim() on stdout/stderr when comparing strings or parsing values
Verbose mode ($.verbose = true) logs all commands and output ‚Äî disable in scripts that handle secrets to avoid credential logging
Parallel execution with Promise.all() can overwhelm system resources for many concurrent processes ‚Äî use p-limit or concurrency control for large parallel workloads

security_score_components.security_notes: Shell injection risk with user-provided input ‚Äî use quote() helper. Verbose mode logs commands including any secrets in arguments. Apache 2.0 license.
